# ProbeOutcomeKind enumeration

The three classes a probe (`server/discover`) response falls into (§5.7).

```csharp
public enum ProbeOutcomeKind
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Supported | `0` | A valid `DiscoverResult`: the server speaks this protocol family. |
| UnsupportedVersion | `1` | A recognized `-32004`: speaks the family, but not the requested revision. |
| NotThisProtocol | `2` | Anything else: the server does not speak this protocol revision. |
